arts.ttl: Fulham will be without five players against Liverpool as Arne Slot gets major injury boost
arts.sum: Fulham make the trip to Anfield on Saturday to take on Premier League leaders Liverpool

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah's private Liverpool ambition could hint at where future really lies
arts.sum: When Mohamed Salah signed his latest Liverpool contract on the Greek island of Mykonos in the summer of 2022, he was sent a message from friend Ian Rush with one not-so-simple instruction

arts.ttl: Fulham suffer Reiss Nelson injury blow as Marco Silva reveals recovery timeline
arts.sum: Fulham manager Marco Silva reveals the extent of Reiss Nelson's hamstring injury ahead of Saturday's Premier League meeting with Liverpool at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Why Man Utd, Liverpool, Arsenal and Barcelona aren't in the Club World Cup 2025
arts.sum: In Europe, Chelsea, Real Madrid (twice) and Manchester City are the teams that have won the Champions League since 2020/21, thus securing automatic qualification for the Club World Cup. 12 European sides will compete in the United States and their participation in the tournament is based on Champions League performances over the past four seasons, with all winners from 2020/21 to 2023/24 automatically reaching the group stage.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon responds to Liverpool transfer link with emphatic Newcastle message
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon has been heavily linked with a move to Liverpool in recent months and the 23-year-old Newcastle star has now spoken out about the transfer rumours

arts.ttl: Liverpool in race for Bayern's Davies - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool are in the hunt to sign Bayern Munich's Alphonso Davies, Manchester City are set to be busy in January, while Girona's Miguel Gutierrez is on Manchester United's radar.

arts.ttl: Liverpool prize money after becoming first club to qualify for the UEFA Champions League Round of 16
Liverpool transfer boost as Martin Zubimendi 'has reservations' about joining major rival
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool transfer news as Martin Zubimendi continues to be linked with the Reds and their rivals following a failed summer move

arts.ttl: Liverpool eye Brighton's Joao Pedro - Thursday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool prioritise signing Joao Pedro, Manchester United set Marcus Rashford price and Real Madrid lose hope on Alphonso Davies.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola responds to Manchester City sack question as Liverpool watch on
arts.sum: Manchester City were beaten 2-0 by Juventus in the Champions League on Wednesday night, extending their sorry run to just one win in ten games in all competitions
